sentence: Shiggles shared with a TwinPC land on no one real.

wombos.definition: Uncontrollable, absurd laughter triggered by something hilarious. Used in place of 'shits and giggles': 'I did it for the shiggles.'
An NPC who mirrors or copies someone else so closely they seem like a twin — a person with no original personality who just echoes those around them.
wombos.example: He just agrees with everything you say — total TwinPC behavior.
